race.name: Kandersteger Volkslauf
race.tagline: Twenty-seven kilometers of freestyle racing beneath the towering Bluemlisalp massif — Swiss Loppet skiing in one of the Bernese Oberland's most dramatic mountain settings.

climate.description: February in Kandersteg at 1,200m in the Bernese Oberland means reliable snow and cold Alpine conditions. Temperatures range from -12°C to 2°C. The narrow valley setting provides shelter from extreme winds but can limit sun exposure. Consistent cold preserves excellent trail conditions.
challenges: Alpine valley cold — sub-zero temperatures common
Limited sun exposure in narrow Kandersteg valley
Occasional Fohn wind can bring rapid warming

course.primary: A 27km freestyle course through the impressive mountain landscape of Kandersteg in the Bernese Oberland. Two rounds of a loop plus a starting section, with mass start from Mullermatte. The course is set beneath the towering Bluemlisalp massif and Oeschinensee area — some of Switzerland's most dramatic Alpine scenery.
course.grooming: Swiss Loppet-standard grooming at Kandersteg Nordic center
features: Bluemlisalp massif backdrop — dramatic Bernese Oberland scenery
Part of the Swiss Loppet series
Near UNESCO World Heritage Jungfrau-Aletsch region

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum scenery score — the Bluemlisalp massif and Bernese Oberland setting is exceptional. Swiss grooming and snow reliability are strong. Small field and primarily Swiss participation limit prestige and competitive depth.

history.summary: The Kandersteger Volkslauf is a Swiss Loppet series race set in the spectacular mountain village of Kandersteg in the Bernese Oberland. The race takes place beneath the towering Bluemlisalp massif, near the UNESCO World Heritage Jungfrau-Aletsch region. Mass start from Mullermatte, the course covers two rounds of a loop through one of Switzerland's most dramatic Alpine Nordic skiing settings.
notable_facts: Set beneath the Bluemlisalp massif in the Bernese Oberland
Near the UNESCO World Heritage Jungfrau-Aletsch region
Part of the Swiss Loppet citizen ski marathon series
Kandersteg is one of Switzerland's premier Nordic skiing villages
